'''Ali-Vor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==History==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Ali-Vor was [[Jedi training/Legends|instructed]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. After achieving the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Ali-Vor furthered his studies, eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Selecting [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Rann I-Kanu]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], the pair set out into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to gain experience and grow from each other.<ref name="IOT" />

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Ali-Vor sent I-Kanu to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to receive supplemental education at the [[Royal House of Learning/Legends|Royal House of Learning]] in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]]. While his student was training, Ali-Vor led a team of investigators to Naboo to examine an illegal wildlife [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation that had been reported to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. While building a case against the culprits, Ali-Vor called upon I-Kanu and sent him into the swamps to locate the smugglers' hideout.<ref name="IOT" />
